title: Image to Base64 Converter
shortDescription: Convert image files to Base64 and data URLs instantly in your browser.
metaTitle: Image to Base64 Converter | Free Browser Tool
metaDescription: Convert images to Base64 or data URLs instantly in your browser. Fast, private, and easy to copy for code, email, and web use.
intro: Turn an image into Base64 or a data URL directly in your browser. No upload to a server, no waiting, and no extra setup.
overview: This tool encodes image data into a Base64 string for quick copy-paste use in HTML, CSS, JSON, and other development workflows. It is useful when you need a data URL for embedding small images, sharing assets, or testing image delivery without a separate file.
howItWorks: Paste or load the image data URL.
The tool reads the image content locally in your browser.
It converts the image to Base64 output instantly.
Copy the result and use it in your project.
useCases: Embed small images inline in HTML or CSS.
Generate data URLs for email templates.
Prepare image strings for JSON or API payloads.
Test Base64 image handling in frontend apps.
Avoid extra file requests for tiny assets.

examples.title: Embed in HTML
examples.description: Use the Base64 string inside an img src or CSS background.

examples.title: Email template asset
examples.description: Store a compact image as text for templated emails.

faq.question: Is my image uploaded to a server?
faq.answer: No. Conversion happens locally in your browser for faster and more private processing.

faq.question: What format does the tool output?
faq.answer: It outputs Base64 text that can be used as part of a data URL or embedded in code.

faq.question: Can I convert any image type?
faq.answer: Most common image formats are supported as long as the browser can read the source data URL.

faq.question: Why use Base64 for images?
faq.answer: Base64 is convenient for inline embedding, small assets, and situations where a plain text image representation is needed.
